config.content.title: Major satta king market categories
config.content.description: Each market has its own timing and result format. Use this guide to understand the labels you see in satta listings.
config.games.items:
Gali|Late-night market known for concise result windows and rapid updates.|🌙
Desawar|Morning-focused schedule with single and jodi emphasis.|☀️
Faridabad|Structured rounds with documented historical results.|📈
Ghaziabad|Often listed with detailed pana breakdowns and fixed closing times.|📊
Delhi Bazaar|Multiple daily rounds with larger archive depth.|🏛️
Shri Ganesh|Listed in select schedules with varied result formats.|🕉️

config.content.title: Standard result notation used in satta
config.content.description: Most satta king 786 listings use the same notation. This section explains the basics for new readers.
config.features.items:
Single|One digit result shown for a market round. Typical display: 7|1️⃣
Jodi|Two digit pairing created from open and close digits. Typical display: 34|2️⃣
Panna|Three digit group used to describe detailed outcomes. Typical display: 158|3️⃣
Morning rounds|Often include Desawar and other early listings with compact windows.|🌅
Evening rounds|Larger markets publish results later with longer time slots.|🌆
Open/Close status|Indicates market activity state and triggers result updates.|🔄

config.content.title: Keep satta information in context
config.content.description: This site documents formats and schedules for satta king audiences. It does not promote winnings or financial outcomes.
config.benefits.items:
Know the rules|Review each market's listed rules, timing notes, and format legend before engaging with any satta content.|📖
Check local regulations|Regulations vary by region. Use the platform only where permitted and follow age requirements.|⚖️
